message:
chore(gitignore): widen .claude/, ignore .beads_snapshots/, .beads/*.pre_*, appendonly.aof

Four ephemeral-artifact classes were slipping through `git status` during
multi-agent sweeps and routine fr-runtime test sessions:

1. `.claude/settings.local.json` was the only ignored entry under
   `.claude/`, but the harness also writes `scheduled_tasks.lock` and
   other transient state there. Widen to the whole `.claude/` dir.

2. `.beads/recovery/`, `.beads/recovery_*/`, and a few specific
   `.beads/*.pre_rebuild_*` patterns were ignored, but `br` also writes
   per-operation backups named `issues.jsonl.pre_cc_redis_close`,
   `.pre_flush_*`, `.pre_sync_*`, etc. — all sharing the `.pre_`
   infix. Generalize from `.beads/*.pre_rebuild_*` to `.beads/*.pre_*`
   so every such backup is covered without having to add the tag-of-
   the-week every time we use a new operation name.

3. `.beads_snapshots/` (plural, whole-directory) is written by `br
   sync` when archiving JSONL history. Ignore it — same rationale as
   the existing `.beads_recovery/` entry.

4. Redis AOF runtime persistence files were never ignored. fr-runtime
   writes `crates/fr-runtime/appendonly.aof` whenever a test session
   enables AOF, and Redis 7+ also writes an `appendonlydir/` sidecar
   with `.base.rdb` / `.incr.aof` / `.manifest` children. Match the
   existing `**/dump.rdb` precedent and ignore:
     - `**/appendonly.aof`         — classic single-file AOF
     - `**/appendonly.aof.*`       — manifest + incremental shards
     - `**/appendonlydir/`         — Redis 7 multi-part AOF sidecar

None of these are source-of-truth; they're all regenerated on each run.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -66,8 +66,8 @@ crates/*/target/
 # Beads history snapshots
 .beads/.br_history/
 
-# Claude local settings
-.claude/settings.local.json
+# Claude local settings + agent scratch dir (scheduled_tasks.lock, settings.local.json, etc.)
+.claude/
 
 # Core dumps and agent config backups
 core.*
@@ -154,10 +154,17 @@ ubs_*.jsonl
 
 # Beads recovery artifacts
 .beads_recovery/
+.beads_snapshots/
 .beads/recovery/
 .beads/recovery_*/
 .beads/*.bad_*
-.beads/*.pre_rebuild_*
+.beads/*.pre_*
+
+# Redis AOF (append-only file) runtime artifact — written by fr-runtime during
+# tests/sessions; not source, never committed.
+**/appendonly.aof
+**/appendonly.aof.*
+**/appendonlydir/
 
 # Extensionless scratch output files
 /check_result_*
